install: ROOT="${workspaceFolder:-${CURSOR_WORKSPACE:-$(pwd)}}" && if [ -f "$ROOT/.venv/bin/activate" ]; then . "$ROOT/.venv/bin/activate"; elif [ -f "$ROOT/venv/bin/activate" ]; then . "$ROOT/venv/bin/activate"; elif ! command -v hermes >/dev/null 2>&1; then cd "$ROOT" && ./setup-hermes.sh; fi && hermes --version
